snippet.title: Liza Koshy & Tobe Nwigwe Discuss Transformers: Rise of the Beasts
snippet.description:
Liza Koshy & Tobe Nwigwe Interview

Returning to the action and spectacle that have captured moviegoers around the world, Transformers: Rise of the Beasts will take audiences on a ‘90s globetrotting adventure with the Autobots and introduce a whole new faction of Transformer – the Maximals – to join them as allies in the existing battle for earth. Directed by Steven Caple Jr. and starring Anthony Ramos and Dominique Fishback, the film arrives in theatres June 9, 2023.

Paramount Pictures and Skydance Present

In Association with Hasbro and New Republic Pictures

A Don Murphy/Tom DeSanto Production

A di Bonaventura Pictures Production

A Bay Films Production



DIRECTED BY

Steven Caple Jr.



SCREENPLAY BY

Joby Harold and Darnell Metayer & Josh Peters

and Erich Hoeber & Jon Hoeber

STORY BY 

Joby Harold

BASED ON

Hasbro’s Transformers™ Action Figures

PRODUCED BY 

Lorenzo di Bonaventura, Tom DeSanto & Don Murphy, Michael Bay,

Mark Vahradian, Duncan Henderson



EXECUTIVE PRODUCERS

Steven Spielberg, Brian Goldner, David Ellison, Dana Goldberg,

Don Granger, Brian Oliver, Bradley J. Fischer, Valerii An



CAST

Anthony Ramos, Dominique Fishback, Luna Lauren Velez, Dean Scott Vazquez, Tobe Nwigwe, Peter Cullen, Ron Perlman,

Peter Dinklage, Michelle Yeoh, Liza Koshy, John DiMaggio, David Sobolov,

Michaela Jaé Rodriguez, Pete Davidson, Colman Domingo, Cristo Fernández, Tongayi ChirisaFROM THE TRANSFORMERS: RISE OF THE BEASTS

NEW YORK CITY PREMIERE AT THE KINGS THEATER IN BROOKLYN, NY

In attendance were the cast and filmmakers, including 

Anthony Ramos, Dominique Fishback, Tobe Nwigwe, Peter Cullen, Ron Perlman, 

Peter Dinklage, Liza Koshy, Michaela Jaé Rodriguez, Pete Davidson, 

Luna Lauren Velez, Cristo Fernández, and Director Steven Caple Jr. #transformers #fabtv #redcarpet #nyc #paramountpictures #anthonyramos  #lizakoshy

snippet.title: Cop Talks - Mad Ron & Matt Price - Edinburgh Fringe 2023
snippet.description:
Get ready for an intriguing and slightly unconventional YouTube video that promises to unravel the enigmatic personas of Mad Ron and Matt Price. In this captivating and unfiltered conversation, they join Copstick on the sofa to discuss the world of stand-up comedy, character comedy, and even delve into the intriguing topic of organised crime.

Unmasking the Comedy World: Join us as Mad Ron and Matt Price peel back the layers of their comedic personas, offering a glimpse into the creative process, the inspiration behind characters, and the challenges of performing comedy.

A Glimpse into the Underworld: The conversation takes a turn as they explore the world of organised crime. Are they as hard as they look? Tune in to find out!

This video is more than just entertainment; it's a unique exploration of comedy, creativity, and the unexpected. Whether you're a comedy enthusiast, a fan of character-driven humor, or simply someone with a curious mind, this conversation has something for everyone. Don't miss out on this engaging and enlightening chat with Copstick, Mad Ron, and Matt Price. Tune in now and get ready to be entertained, intrigued, and thoroughly amused!

Mad Ron: Crime School
https://tickets.edfringe.com/whats-on/mad-ron-crime-school 

Matt Price: As Seen on CCTV
https://tickets.edfringe.com/whats-on/matt-price-as-seen-on-cctv

Find out more about Copstick’s charity 
https://www.mamabiashara.com

snippet.title: Sal Guerriero talks Big LFA Opportunity, ATT, Coaches, Training, STA HS, MMA, Family, Josh Silveira
snippet.description:
Video interview with up-n-coming MMA talent Sal Guerriero at American Top Team in (South Florida) Coconut Creek.
Guerriero, 27, is a graduate of (Fort Lauderdale-based) St. Thomas Aquinas High School, where he starred in wrestling. He is 6-3 in MMA and is preparing for his biggest fight to date for Legacy Fighting Alliance during LFA 168 on Friday, Sept. 22 at the Mystic Lake Casino Hotel in Prior Lake, Minnesota.
LFA 168 will be broadcast live at 9 p.m. ET / 6 p.m. PT on UFC FIGHT PASS.
Guerriero fought in January on an AFL card, defeating Matthew Knauss by KO/TKO at 1:40 of the first round at the Seminole Hard Rock Hotel & Casino near (South Florida) Hollywood.
Guerriero grew up friends with PFL title contender Josh Silveira. Guerriero's dad and uncle trained under the legendary Marcus "Conan" Silveira, a co-founder of American Top Team along with Dan Lambert. Conan is Josh's dad, and Guerriero's uncle Richie is an integral part of ATT.
Web: https://www.lfa.com/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/LFAfighting/
Twitter/X: https://twitter.com/LFAfighting
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/lfafighting/
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@LFA_Fighting
snippet.channelTitle: Pro Wrestling & MMA Interviews with Me (Jimmy V3)

snippet.title: SVB's Collapse and M&A: Why Aerospace and Defense Are In a Goldilocks Position
snippet.description:
Stories about the collapse of banks rightfully spook investors in a variety of industries, but things aren’t quite as dire as they are made out to be. Collapses make for great news stories, but if we really look at what’s happening in the aerospace and defense market, there’s no real cause for media panic. 

Why is A&D in what my guest calls “A Goldilocks Place” right now? How do we separate media-fueled panic from what’s actually happening?

In this episode, aerospace and defense M&A banker and Founder and President of Alderman & Company, Bill Alderman returns to share how the “credit scare” is affecting A&D. 

Three Things You’ll Learn In This Episode 

-Why aerospace and defense are in a really great place right now
It’s very rare for both A & D to be having a good run. Why are they thriving?

-How aerospace and defense have been affected by the “capital scare”
With inflation and everything else going on, is this a great time to sell your aerospace and defense business?

-Strategic buyers are keeping the market honest
Are financial buyers taking advantage of the situation to try and get a better deal? 


Guest Bio 

William ‘Bill’ Alderman is the Founder and President of Alderman & Company who are aerospace and defense M&A bankers. Bill has always had a passion for aviation, and is both a commercial pilot and aircraft owner. Today, he uses his expertise, coupled with his interests to represent Middle Market Sellers in the Aerospace and Defense industry. 

To find out more, go to:
https://aldermanco.com/ 

You can also call or text him on: 
9144144070

Or email him at: 
wa@aldermanco.com 

Learn More About Your Host:

Co-founder and Managing Partner for Northstar Group, Craig is focused on recruiting senior level leadership, sales and operations executives for some of the most prominent companies in the aviation and aerospace industry. Clients include well known aircraft OEM’s, aircraft operators, leasing / financial organizations, and Maintenance / Repair / Overhaul (MRO) providers. 

Since 2009 Craig has personally concluded more than 150 executive searches in a variety of disciplines. As the only executive recruiter who has flown airplanes, sold airplanes AND run a business, Craig is uniquely positioned to build deep, lasting relationships with both executives and the boards and stakeholders they serve. This allows him to use a detailed, disciplined process that does more than pair the ideal candidate with the perfect opportunity, and hit the business goals of the companies he serves.

snippet.title: Peter van Inwagen - What Things Really Exist?
snippet.description:
When you ask what things really exist, and you think deeply about this probe to apprehend what is out there, you see the whole world anew. What are the most general categories to understand the world? It’s such a simple question; how can it inspire such profound insights?

Make a donation to Closer To Truth to help us continue exploring the world's deepest questions without the need for paywalls: https://shorturl.at/OnyRq

Free access to Closer to Truth's library of 5,000 videos: http://bit.ly/376lkKN

Watch more interviews on the metaphysics of the cosmos: https://bit.ly/3R5mb90

Support the show with Closer To Truth merchandise: https://bit.ly/3P2ogje

Peter van Inwagen is an American analytic philosopher and the John Cardinal O’Hara Professor Emeritus of Philosophy at the University of Notre Dame.

Register for free at CTT.com for subscriber-only exclusives: https://bit.ly/3He94Ns

Closer To Truth, hosted by Robert Lawrence Kuhn and directed by Peter Getzels, presents the world’s greatest thinkers exploring humanity’s deepest questions. Discover fundamental issues of existence. Engage new and diverse ways of thinking. Appreciate intense debates. Share your own opinions. Seek your own answers.

snippet.title: City of God vs. City of Man - Timothy Flanders | Catholic Culture Podcast #158
snippet.description:
It's time for a big-picture look at Church history! Timothy S. Flanders joins the podcast to discuss his book City of God vs. City of Man: The Battles of the Church from Antiquity to the Present. The book is a synthesis of the approaches of St. Augustine and Christopher Dawson, whom Timothy calls the two greatest Catholic historians.

Themes discussed include:
• The Hebrew (Old Testament) view of history
• The need for alliance between the "strict" and "moderate" parties of Catholic orthodoxy
• Ethnic pluralism in Christendom
• The Grand Coalition of the Status Quo
• The ideology of Roma and its role in the Eastern schism
• The love of money as a key factor in the breakdown of Christendom

LINKS

City of God vs. City of Man: The Battles of the Church from Antiquity to the Present https://www.amazon.com/City-God-vs-Man-Antiquity/dp/0578317346/

The Meaning of Catholic https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCaMoKEEA-KKDNgx3icjA36Q

SUBSCRIBE to the Catholic Culture Podcast https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/the-catholic-culture-podcast/id1377089807

DONATE to make this show possible! http://catholicculture.org/donate/audio

Go to Catholic Culture's website for tons of written content, including news, articles, liturgical year info, and a vast library of documents: https://www.catholicculture.org

SOCIAL
https://twitter.com/CatholicPods
https://www.facebook.com/catholicculture

snippet.title: Introduction to Orthodox Christianity: A Practical Guide for Inquirers
snippet.description:
Looking for an introduction to Orthodox Christianity? This video offers a compelling guide to Orthodoxy—its spiritual depth, living tradition, and timeless truth.

Fr. Peter Heers explains why Orthodoxy doesn’t need reform, how the Saints embody the same life of Christ seen in the Apostles, and why truth—not emotion—is the foundation of authentic faith. You’ll learn what it means to become a catechumen, how to approach the Church with reverence, and why a trusted spiritual guide is essential.

If you're asking what is Orthodox Christianity and how to enter fully into it, this video is for you. This talk is more than informational—it’s a call to repentance, discipleship, and communion with Christ in His Body, the Orthodox Church.

Watch PART ONE of this series: https://youtube.com/live/4BV0SBo3bGw?feature=share

Chapters:
00:00 – Introduction
02:52 – Following the Holy Fathers Tradition
04:19 – Contemporary Search for Spiritual Experience
08:39 – Orthodox Church's Living Tradition
13:19 – Contemporary Orthodox Saints and Elders
21:14 – How to Approach Orthodox Christianity
24:58 – Finding a Trusted Orthodox Guide
29:47 – Stability in Orthodox Church
33:05 – Avoiding Extremes in Orthodoxy
34:48 – The Church as Christ's Body
39:04 – Understanding the Catechumenate Process
45:55 – Recommended Orthodox Reading List
49:42 – Example of St. Anthony the Great
52:06 – Beginning the Question & Answer Session
53:09 – Leading Family into Orthodox Christianity
57:20 – Orthodox Baptism and Economia
59:13 – Orthodox Teaching on Afterlife (Toll Houses)
1:03:37 – Avoiding Modernism in Orthodox Churches
1:08:57 – Contradictions Between Orthodox Saints
1:11:45 – Teenager Seeking Orthodox Christianity
1:14:16 – Developing Patristic Orthodox Mind
1:19:28 – Finding a Traditional Orthodox Parish
1:23:01 – Orthodox Church Live Streaming
1:27:07 – No Orthodox Church Near Me
1:30:34 – Orthodoxy and Political Change
1:36:07 – Choosing Between Orthodox Jurisdictions
1:36:44 – Christ Living in Orthodox Saints
1:38:08 – Orthodox Church and COVID
1:41:56 – Holy Scripture and Holy Fathers
1:44:35 – Jesus Prayer for Non-Orthodox
1:46:46 – How Can I Love God With All My Heart?
1:52:09 – Genesis 6 Orthodox Interpretation
1:52:43 – Orthodox Saints vs Catholic Saints
1:57:57 – Becoming Orthodox: Next Steps Guide
1:59:51 – Orthodox Church in America Discussion
2:02:23 – Livestreaming Services Guidelines and Problems
2:05:02 – Baptism vs Chrismation Debate Explained
2:08:28 – Spiritual Growth and Humility Questions
2:10:03 – Poor Behavior In Orthodox Apologetics
2:12:20 – Lent Fasting Guidelines for Beginners
2:15:08 – Exorcism and Spiritual Curses Discussion
2:16:39 – Orthodox Jurisdictions in America Recommendations
2:17:32 – Icon Veneration and Self Disgust
2:19:38 – Prayer Rules for Orthodox Beginners
2:24:23 – Recommended Orthodox Prayer Book Options
2:25:39 – How to Force Yourself to Pray
2:27:53 – Orthodox Monasticism and Reading Literature
2:28:45 – Incense Sensitivity Solutions for Church
2:30:33 – Orthodox Theology vs Protestant Views
2:31:38 – Phariseeism in Christianity
2:32:57 – Grace Outside the Orthodox Church
2:40:12 – My Father is Offering Me Something Sinful...
2:42:44 – Submitting to Christ Over Worldly Bonds
2:45:08 – Why Orthodox Clergy Have Beards
2:48:00 – Divine and Human Nature Questions
2:48:25 – "Upon this rock I will build My Church" Explained
2:51:27 – Tips for Learning Greek Language
2:52:29 – Eating Out During Lent Guidelines
2:53:27 – Choosing a Spiritual Father Outside My Parish

Our mission is to present and support the Orthodox Christian Way, Truth, and Life, which is Christ Himself — guiding souls to communion in His Body, faithful to the teachings of the Holy Fathers. 

👉 Become a YouTube Member for exclusive livestreams and videos, Q&A’s, book discounts, and more:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UChozbOPP6uOJ2UkiTZy-sgQ/join

🎥 New to Orthodoxy? Start here with our "Orthodoxy 101" playlist
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLCFiE3qfVkDisaFlaa38cO_iTvnpsUnhc

📚 Explore our full collection of Orthodox Christian books:
https://www.uncutmountainpress.com

📝 Read our blog for weekly insights on Orthodox faith and tradition:
https://www.orthodoxethos.com/blog

✉️ Questions? Contact us at: team@orthodoxethos.com

#OrthodoxChristianityExplained #Orthodoxy #ConvertToOrthodoxy #OrthodoxChristianity #IntroductionToOrthodoxy

snippet.title: 2 on 1 Wrestling Ultimate Finish by GEORGE IVANOV
snippet.description:
The 2 on 1 Wrestling Ultimate Finish by GEORGE IVANOV
-
For The Best BJJ Instructional Videos, Check Out: https://bjjfanatics.com
-
For all your BJJ Gear and Apparel Needs Visit - https://store.bjjfanatics.com/
-
Are you a BJJ Fanatics Insider? If not, you are missing out! Join now at: https://bjjfanatics.com/products/insiders-club
-
Bernardo Faria is a 5x World Champion. Bernardo started training Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu in Juiz de Fora - MG, Brazil at the age of 14 in 2001. After receiving the Black Belt from his first instructor Ricardo Marques in 2008, He moved to Sao Paulo to join BJJ legend Fabio Gurgel and his Alliance team. After many years of training and winning many major titles, Bernardo moved to NYC in 2013 to train and teach at Marcelo Garcia Academy. In 2015 Bernardo achieved his dream of winning the IBJJF World Championship Open class title and his division, doing the double Gold and becoming the 1st in the IBJJF Ranking and also chosen as the best athlete of 2015. 
 
Bernardo Faria has now taken on the mission to share some of the lessons, techniques, experiences and more that he has learned along in his 16 years and counting as a BJJ student, teacher and world class competitor.
 
Subscribe to his channel, and join him in this amazing BJJ Journey. We promise that you will also improve your BJJ with his awesome Video Lessons, Episodes of his "5 Minutes BJJ Talk" and more...
 
www.fujisports.com -  15% OFF Coupon Code: FARIA15
 
www.bjjfanatics.com - 10% OFF Coupon Code: YOUTUBEFARIA
 
www.fujimats.com - 10% OFF Coupon Code: FARIAMAT10
 
http://bernardofaria.com
https://www.facebook.com/bernardofariabjj/
https://www.instagram.com/bernardofariabjj/
https://twitter.com/bernardofariajj
 
.

snippet.title: Design in Motion: The Captivating Art of Movement with Rommel Ruiz (Ep. 18)
snippet.description:
➡️ Today we’re chatting with illustrator and designer Rommel Ruiz! His journey from classical theater to motion design is simply fascinating, and can even be felt in his own work today, which we explore while discussing his Favorite Frame™ 🖼️

➡️ Check out this episode of the podcast on the following platforms too:
Spotify, https://spoti.fi/3K8UDd7
Apple Podcasts, https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/styleframe-saturdays/id1607658120

Twitter, https://twitter.com/styleframesat

snippet.title: Matt Ramos vs. Jacob Moran
snippet.description:
This was a big match to start off the Purdue vs. Indiana dual. Jacob Moran did not give up bonus points to Matt Ramos, a huge team victory despite the individual loss. The Boilermakers ended up losing the dual 17-16, those non-bonus points were crucial to the Hoosier win. 

pbp - Craig Combs 
color commentary - Brendon Gorham

snippet.title: Big Diamond Speedway | Prelude to the Coalcracker Feature Highlights | 8/18/23
snippet.description:
Highlights from Big Diamond Speedway in Minersville, Pa., on Friday, August 18, 2023.  

It was a race that had many twists and turns but at the end it was invader Anthony Perrego standing in Red White and Blue Autos victory lane after capturing the 50-lap Prelude to the Coalcracker.

Watch racing events from around the Northeast live on Dirt Track Digest TV at http://www.dirttrackdigest.tv including weekly action from the Big Diamond Speedway.

Click the subscribe button to see more from Dirt Track Digest and Dirt Track Digest TV.

localized.title: Big Diamond Speedway | Prelude to the Coalcracker Feature Highlights | 8/18/23
localized.description:
Highlights from Big Diamond Speedway in Minersville, Pa., on Friday, August 18, 2023.  

It was a race that had many twists and turns but at the end it was invader Anthony Perrego standing in Red White and Blue Autos victory lane after capturing the 50-lap Prelude to the Coalcracker.

Watch racing events from around the Northeast live on Dirt Track Digest TV at http://www.dirttrackdigest.tv including weekly action from the Big Diamond Speedway.

snippet.title: “Why Do Some Thomists Scoff at Analytic Philosophy?” | Philip-Neri Reese, OP
snippet.description: Fr. Philip-Neri Reese, O.P., is a Dominican friar of the Province of St. Joseph and a Professor of Philosophy at the Pontifical University of St. Thomas (Angelicum) in Rome. He is also the principal investigator for the Angelicum Thomistic Institute's new Project on Philosophy and the Thomistic Tradition. Fr. Philip-Neri received his Licentiate in Philosophy from the Catholic University of America in 2015 and his Doctorate in Philosophy from the University of Notre Dame in 2022. From 2015-2017 he taught philosophy at Providence College in Providence, RI. His main area of research is metaphysics and anything adjacent to it (e.g., the history of metaphysics, the methodology of metaphysics, etc.), with a special emphasis on the metaphysical thought of St. Thomas Aquinas and its subsequent reception and interpretation. His publications, however, range widely, including articles on philosophical anthropology, ethics, and economics. He is also an enthusiast of classical Indian philosophy. Fr. Philip-Neri is a member of the American Philosophical Association (APA), the Society for Medieval and Renaissance Philosophy (SMRP), the Aquinas and the Arabs International Working Group (AAIWG), the Society for Medieval and Renaissance Thomism (SMART), and currently has the honor of serving on the executive committee of the American Catholic Philosophical Association (ACPA).

snippet.title: Chewjitsu Podcast #273 - Big Dan Mansoiu
snippet.description:
On this episode of the podcast, Chewy and Eugene are joined by Jiu-Jitsu Purple Belt "Big" Dan Manasoiu.

Dan joins the podcast to discuss his start in Jiu-Jitsu at age 14, his 6 hour commute from Pennsylvania to train at Renzo Gracie New York, what set Renzo Gracie New York apart from other gyms, getting humbled by smaller grapplers, his daily training schedule, the advantage of teaching Jiu-Jitsu, how he fine tunes a technique to work at a high level, dealing with internet trolls, his strength training routine, Dan’s thoughts on John Danaher’s commitment to his students and to Jiu-Jitsu, his proudest Jiu-Jitsu achievement, favorite Jiu-Jitsu rule set, and Dan’s hobbies outside of Jiu-Jitsu.

Thanks to the podcast sponsors:

Charlotte's Web CBD.

Head over to https://bit.ly/chewjitsu30 and use the promo code Chewjitsu30 to get 30% off of your total purchase of some high quality CBD to help with all of your recovery needs.
